channel.title: Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings

item.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
item.description: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/the-next-phase-of-education-for-countries

item.title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
item.description: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/advancing-content-provenance

item.title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
item.description: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/dell-codex-enterprise-partnership

item.title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
item.description: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/malta-chatgpt-plus-partnership

item.title: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
item.description: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S. Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/personal-finance-chatgpt

item.title: Work with Codex from anywhere
item.description: Use Codex anywhere with the ChatGPT mobile app. Monitor, steer, and approve coding tasks in real time across devices and remote environments. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/work-with-codex-from-anywhere

item.title: Helping ChatGPT better recognize context in sensitive conversations
item.description: Learn how new ChatGPT safety updates improve context awareness in sensitive conversations, helping detect risk over time and respond more safely. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/chatgpt-recognize-context-in-sensitive-conversations
